exact_smaller_sufficient_theorem.statement: Identify the charged determinant trace lift by 3 mu(r) = sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(r) on the charged L-H-E determinant channel. The determinant fiber equalizer then follows from the existing physical identity-mode equalizer.
why_smaller_than_full_landing: It asks only for one determinant character and its trace-lift identification.
It does not ask for the full charged Yukawa matrix Y_e(P).
It is still sufficient to force s_det(P) and A_ch(P).

broader_open_landing.formula: B_D10(P) -> Y_e(P) or equivalently B_D10(P) -> s_det(P)

notes: The live q_e payload is already populated on the realized same-label arrows.
The remaining theorem is no longer a missing q_e readback claim.
The determinant fiber equalizer follows once the trace-lift identity 3 mu(r) = sum_e M_e^ch log q_e(r) is proved on the charged determinant channel.
